channel.title: Posts on EndurAut's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on EndurAut's blog

item.title: EndurAut
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: 有你陪着是我来之不易的幸福 小七,我希望明年依旧你还会陪着我. 爱人先爱己择人先问心. The course of true love never did run smooth---It is impossible to love and to be wise---The best proff of love is trust 真诚的爱情之

item.title: 用hugo搭建blog主题 stack-mod
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: 准备工作 一台电脑,一个人,一个能连GitHub.com的网络,以及GitHub的账号,最重要的足够的耐心. 前提须知 请下载除安装hugo用到c

item.title: Hugo | Hugo-stack-theme主题魔改版
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: Github仓库地址：Mantyke/stack-theme-mod 本主题由CaiJimmy制作并发布，这个仓库是由Mantyke修改的魔改

item.title: Chinese Test
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: 短代码测试 三月，因久旱不雨，苏轼赴郿，祈雨于太白山之上清宫。数日后，虽有微雨，父老以为不足，于是，再陪宋太守亲往祭祷，回程路上，便见道中有云

item.title: Markdown Syntax Guide
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: This article offers a sample of basic Markdown syntax that can be used in Hugo content files, also it shows whether basic HTML elements are decorated with CSS in a Hugo theme.

item.title: Placeholder Text
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: Lorem est tota propiore conpellat pectoribus de pectora summo.

item.title: Math Typesetting
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: Mathematical notation in a Hugo project can be enabled by using third party JavaScript libraries.

item.title: Emoji Support
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: Emoji can be enabled in a Hugo project in a number of ways.
